chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-291 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of CMA 1234/24 3.For hearing of main case 24-04-2024 Petitioner is present in person. M/s Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G and Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G a/w SIP Allah Wadhayo Shar and ASI Nizakat Ali Wassan of P.S, Kumb. ***** Petitioner is present in person. Learned APG has filed statements on behalf of respondents No.4&5 and submits that case/crime No.20 of 2024, registered at P.S, Kumb, quashment of which is sought through this petition, has been challaned and the trial is pending before the Court of 2nd Additional Sessions Judge, Khairpur. In view of such fact, petitioner does not press this petition and submits that he may be put at liberty to file application first before the trial Court under section 265-K CrPC for the same relief, for which other side has no objection. Accordingly, this petition along with listed application is disposed of. However, petitioner may file application before the trial Court, as above, which if filed ever, shall be decided on its own merits. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
